commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Woe to them that devise iniquity, and work evil upon their beds. when the morning is light, they practice it, because it is in the power of their hand. Septuagint, "labours. "Hebrew, "vanity, or an idol. "(Haydock) That is called unprofitable, which is very detrimental. (Worthington) Morning, suddenly and with zeal. (Calmet) Is. Hebrew, "has power "(Chaldean) "they have not raised their hands to God. "(Septuagint; Arabic).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
